perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with auburn hair and a cream-colored shirt stands in front of anime posters, holding a POP MART shopping bag and a League of Legends Arcane blind box set with a wide smile. (2) She turns the box to show a grid of characters on the back, pointing at specific ones with her finger. (3) She begins unboxing, pulling out character cards and figures one by one; her expressions shift between playful disappointment when she gets duplicates and high-energy excitement. (4) She holds up a specific grey, stone-textured figure (Mel) to the camera, tilting it to show the texture, followed by pulling a colorful Jinx figure. (5) Close-up shots focus on her hands manipulating the detailed figures, highlighting their painting and sculpting. (6) She stands back, holding multiple figures in her arms while gesturing toward the camera during the final address.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, fast-paced electronic BGM with a clear drum beat begins. A female voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin with a high pitch. (2) Rustling sounds of plastic bags and the crisp sound of cardboard boxes being torn open are heard. (3) The speaker's voice becomes more animated, shouting names of characters followed by exaggerated groans and humorous 'angry' grunts. (4) A sharp gasp and a sudden increase in volume occur as a new item is revealed. (5) A second female voice occasionally laughs or makes brief comments off-camera. (6) The music remains at a consistent volume as the speaker transitions to a more explanatory tone, concluding with a friendly parting phrase.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Large red and white 'POP MART' and 'ARCANE' titles are displayed. (2) Descriptive hooks like '天啊～很好看耶' (Oh my god, it looks so good) and '好扯喔' (That's crazy) appear to emphasize emotional reactions. (3) Functional markers such as '(開出杰西)' (Pulled Jayce) and '(開出艾克)' (Pulled Ekko) identify the specific products. (4) Giveaway instructions are presented: 'TIKTOK 的留言抽出兩位!' and 'Instagram 的留言抽出一位!'. (5) Closing text states '最後還是把隱藏版補齊了!' (Finally completed the hidden version set!) to wrap up the narrative.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire unboxing sequence -> Reveal of rare hidden version -> Call to action for giveaway

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator visible; 1 off-screen female voice heard.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with light brown/auburn hair in a low ponytail, wearing a beige short-sleeved collared shirt, a pearl necklace, and carrying a tan shoulder bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A wall decorated with large anime banners, including one clearly showing the character Makima from Chainsaw Man, suggesting a pop-culture themed environment.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, diffused indoor lighting typical of a retail or studio setting.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cuts synchronized with visual scene changes and comedic timing.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Loop of Unboxing -> Climax (Hidden Pull) -> Resolution (Giveaway CTA)
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to entertain the creator's audience through the shared suspense of unboxing 'blind box' collectibles. It documents the creator's luck in pulling a rare 'hidden' version from the POP MART Arcane series and uses this excitement to drive engagement for a social media giveaway on TikTok and Instagram.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on showcasing products from POP MART, featuring the brand bag, official packaging, and the unboxing experience as the primary content.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Heavy use of variety-show style text stickers and high-pitched expressive vocal reactions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The discrepancy between the single visual human and two vocal profiles indicates the presence of a camera operator who interacts with the creator, adding a naturalistic 'vlog' feel to the unboxing.
